CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-20-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment -Unlimited Civil Jurisdiction
Off Calendar May-02-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Eunisol LLC, a limited liability company and John J. Ho.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Denis Klavdianos, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Synnex Corporation.
No appearance by defendants Eunisol LLC, a limited liability Company or John J. Ho.
Plaintiff's complaint for Money Due for Goods Sold and Delivered was filed on January 4, 2019, and personally on defendants Eunisol LLC, a limited liability company, and John J. Ho on January 25, 2019.
Defaults as to defendants Eunisol LLC, a limited liability company, and John J. Ho were entered on March 7, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on March 7, 2019.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on May 1, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Synnex Corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendants Eunisol LLC, a limited liability company, and John J. Ho, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $41,576.35.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,685.93.
Attorney Fees - $2,250.00.
Costs - $576.50.

Total - $51,088.78.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
